tasks.label: ng
tasks.detail: Run the Angular CLI inside this workspace (pass args after --).

tasks.label: start
tasks.detail: Serve the gallery app on http://localhost:4200 with HMR.

tasks.label: build
tasks.detail: Production build of the gallery app to dist/gallery.

tasks.label: build:theme
tasks.detail: Build the publishable @mucsi96/angular-material-theme package to dist/theme.

tasks.label: build:gallery
tasks.detail: Build the gallery for GitHub Pages (sets the /angular-material-theme/ base href).

tasks.label: test
tasks.detail: Run all unit tests in watch mode.

tasks.label: watch
tasks.detail: Rebuild the gallery on file change (dev configuration, no server).
